app.title: Show HN: Agent Vault – Open-source credential proxy and vault for agents
app.author: dangtony98
app.description: A free, open-source credential proxy and vault for agents
proposed_tests: Create a credential proxy using Agent Vault
Access sensitive data using the proxy
